import java.lang.System.Logger;
import java.lang.System.Logger.Level;

// Arg-flow is required, as for slf4j: ERROR on the real JDK logger still
// swallows when the caught object never reaches the arguments.
class SystemLoggerNoArgFlow {
    private static final Logger log = System.getLogger("x");

    void errorWithoutTheCaught() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(Level.ERROR, "failed, but the error object is dropped");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
